positive: A minimalist, abstract geometric pattern illustration inspired by Bauhaus design. Interlocking shapes of primary colors (red, yellow, blue) forming a dynamic, repeating composition. Clean lines, flat design, negative space utilization, vector illustration, graphic poster art.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, realism, texture, shading, depth of field
